name: create-test-articles
description: Creates test article nodes with body text, taxonomy tags, and placeholder images. Each article gets a random subset of tags and a unique placeholder image downloaded from picsum.photos. Useful for populating a demo site with sample content for listing pages.

parameters.name: TAG_VOCAB
parameters.description: Taxonomy vocabulary to pull tags from

parameters.name: IMAGES
parameters.description: Set to '0' to skip placeholder image download

preconditions: The taxonomy vocabulary exists with terms
Internet access is available (for placeholder image downloads)
